hero.heading: Refunds & Returns
hero.subtitle: Our return, refund, and exchange policies for research-grade products.

intro: At Peptide Pure™, we are committed to quality and accuracy. Due to the sensitive, research-grade nature of our products, all orders are subject to strict quality control and handling standards. Please review this policy carefully before placing an order.

sections.title: Return Policy
sections.text: Returns are accepted only under the following circumstances:
items: The product arrived damaged or defective
Your order was incomplete or missing items

sections.title: To Be Eligible for a Return
items: You must contact us within 7 days of delivery
Items must be unused, unopened, and in their original packaging
Valid proof of purchase is required (order number or receipt)
sections.extra: Due to the nature of our products, opened, used, or tampered items are not eligible for return under any circumstances.

sections.title: Refund Policy
sections.text: Once an approved return is received and inspected, you will be notified of the approval or denial of your refund.
items: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method
Refunds are typically processed within 5–10 business days
Processing times may vary depending on your bank or payment provider

sections.title: Non-Refundable Situations
sections.text: Refunds will not be issued for:
items: Shipping delays, carrier issues, or customs delays

sections.title: Exchanges
sections.text: We do not offer direct exchanges.
sections.extra: If you received an incorrect product due to our error, a verified replacement will be shipped at no additional cost after confirmation.

sections.title: Return Shipping
items: If the return is due to our error (incorrect or defective item), a prepaid return label will be provided
For all other approved returns, the customer is responsible for return shipping costs

sections.title: How to Request a Return or Refund
sections.text: To initiate a return or refund request:
items: Include your order number and a clear description of the issue
Attach photos if the item arrived damaged or incorrect
Wait for confirmation and return instructions from our support team
sections.extra: Unauthorized returns will not be accepted.
